name: linConfigureResponse
title: linConfigureResponse
syntax: dword linConfigureResponse(dword frameId, dword dlc, byte[] responseData); // form 1
description: Configures a response frame of a LIN node if no database is used.
This function may only be called in the event procedure on preStart.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: ID of the LIN frame which will be configured as response.

return: Returns 1 if the configuration of the response succeeded, otherwise 0.
